series_metadata.series_title: Area Agencies on Aging (AAA) - Strategic Plan
series_metadata.series_description: AAAs 4 year Strategic Plans through which the AAAs review needs of older Ohioans within their regions, identify resources to meet those needs, identify any gaps of services and how to meet and close those gaps indentified. File includes - Needs Asseessment, the annual Operational Elements, Goals & Objectives and correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: current plan and 1 prior plan in office end of strategic plan period ; Electronic: current plan and 1 prior plan in office end of strategic plan period
